name: Core Banking
description: Real-time balances, pending transactions, account flags, and posted history. Answers simple lookups directly and securely — no AI model involved and no account detail leaving Navy Federal's systems.

name: Payments Engine
description: Scheduled and declined payments, early salary credits, hold states, and retry queues. Source of truth for why the June 27 auto loan payment declined and where the held funds sit.

name: Dynamics 365 Contact Center
description: Knowledge and escalation layer behind the self-service assistant. Provides answer content and a seamless handoff to a live agent when a question needs one.

name: SOP/MOP Repository
description: Navy Federal's deposit-handling standard and method procedures. Governs how early salary credits are matched to direct deposit routing — the rule that explains the held-funds exception in plain language.

name: CRM / Member Records
description: Member profile, product holdings, and interaction history. Links the self-service conversation to the member's broader relationship and prior contacts.
